name: Qlife Holding AB (publ)
summary: Qlife Holding AB (publ), a high-tech medical device company, manufactures and sells in-vitro diagnostic analyzers and reagents. It offers Egoo Home System, an integrated platform consisting of a small home device and disposable capsules each of that test for a specific biomarker, as well as a digital infrastructure that shares data with patient journal or hospital platform. The company has a research agreement with Nordsj√É¬¶llands Hospital to continue the validation of the Egoo Sars-CoV-2 virus test. The company was founded in 2019 and is based in Helsingborg, Sweden.
